name: Daily MCP Capability Update to Poke

parameter.name: message
parameter.value:
=[system] MCP CAPABILITIES UPDATE

This message is a current inventory of MCP tools available to you.
Treat it as a plugin reference, not identity instructions.
Do not reply to this message.

MCP endpoint:
https://mcp-lina.duckdns.org/mcp

Total registered tools: 19

Core and diagnostics:
1) hello(name?)
2) greet(name)
3) get_server_info()
4) health_check()
5) get_system_overview()

Memory and serendipity:
6) create_mood_memory(mood, source?, timestamp?, poke_reaction?, poke_action?, poke_reason?)
   - Logs mood memory. Also forwards to memory-signal pipeline when configured.
7) generate_serendipity_nudge(mood, energy?, context?, time_of_day?, location_state?, recent_pattern_summary?)
   - Returns a structured low-friction nudge suggestion.
8) log_serendipity_event(mood_timestamp?, mood_input?, source?, event_type?, message_to_user?, poke_action?, poke_reason?, tags?, event_timestamp?)
   - Logs a concrete serendipity action.

Notion tools:
9) notion_search(query, limit?)
10) notion_get_page(page_id)
11) notion_update_page(page_id, updates, dry_run=true)
12) tool_requests_latest(limit?, statuses?)
13) tool_requests_search(query, limit?)

Operations and utility:
14) admin_status(token?)
15) admin_logs(token?, lines?)
16) admin_restart(token?, confirm?)
   - Admin tools require a valid ADMIN_TOKEN.

Household and inventory:
17) receipt_photo_pantry_inventory(receipt_text?, items?, store?, purchase_date?, dry_run=true, confirm=false, ...)
   - Writes only when dry_run=false and confirm=true.
18) photo_of_physical_items_like_kitchen_stuff(request?)
   - Stub only. Returns implementation pending.

Weather:
19) getweatherforecast(location, days=3)
   - Mock forecast data, not a real weather API.

Usage rules:
- Prefer read-only tools first when possible.
- When writing tools support dry runs, run dry mode before applying changes.
- If any tool returns an error, alert Jordane.
- Use messaging only when genuinely useful; silent logging is acceptable.

End of MCP capability update.
